title: Plan
description: Schema for Plan from CMS Marketplace API

has_national_network.description: if plan has a national network of providers

max_age_child.description: the maximum age a person is considered a child on their parents' plan

premium.description: monthly premium in US dollars, unsubsidized (i.e., no APTC applied)

premium_w_credit.description: monthly premium in US dollars, with APTC applied

ehb_premium.description: monthly premium in US dollars, for essential health benefits portion of total premium

pediatric_ehb_premium.description: monthly pediatric portion of the ehb premium in US dollars

aptc_eligible_premium.description: the portion of the premium that is eligible for APTC

guaranteed_rate.description: true if the premiums are guaranteed (versus estimated)

simple_choice.description: true if the plan is a Simple Choice plan

hsa_eligible.description: Is this plan eligible as an HSA?

oopc.description: out-of-pocket cost; calculated when age, gender and utilization_level are present, otherwise -1

scope.description: The county for which the network adequacy is in scope

networks.description: Specialty networks and their network types

baby.description: Typical yearly costs for having a healthy pregnancy and normal delivery for one person

diabetes.description: Typical yearly costs for managing type 2 diabetes for one person

fracture.description: Typical yearly costs for treating a simple fracture

is_ineligible.description: If the given enrollment group/household is ineligible for the plan by business rules, it will be flagged true

service_area_id.description: 6-character id representing the geographic area the plan accepts members from.  The first two characters are the state's abbreviation.
